SQLLite.SQL: select rp_username as "UserName" , du_user_short_name as "Alias" , rp_case_number as "CaseNumber" , rp_report_id as "ReportId" , rp_report_name as "ReportName" , rp_report_date as "Date" , rp_printed as "Printed" , rp_fw_report_id as "FWReportId" , rp_order_id as "ModuleName" from (select row_number() over(order by rp.report_date desc , rp.fw_report_id) as r , rp.username as rp_username , decode(du.user_short_name, null, 'Alias Not Allocated', du.user_short_name) as du_user_short_name , rp.case_number as rp_case_number , rp.report_id as rp_report_id , rp.report_name as rp_report_name , rp.report_date as rp_report_date , rp.printed as rp_printed , rp.fw_report_id as rp_fw_report_id , rp.order_id as rp_order_id from report_reprints rp , user_court uc , report_queue rq , dca_user du where rp.username = uc.user_id and uc.user_id = du.user_id and uc.court_code = ${param.courtId} and rp.fw_report_id = rq.id and rq.document_id is not null order by rp.report_date desc, rp.fw_report_id) where r < ((${param.pageNumber}*${param.pageSize})+1) and r > ((${param.pageNumber}*${param.pageSize})-${param.pageSize})
